description: Example allowlist of windows the approved-window paste harness MAY target. This is a TEMPLATE with conservative placeholders and NO secrets. A window must match an entry here AND be currently visible before the harness treats it as an approved paste target. Even then, live paste execution stays disabled behind approved_window_paste_enabled; the operator pastes manually with Ctrl+V. Chat / browser / agent app windows are intentionally NOT approved by default.
match_policy: A window matches when process_name matches case-insensitively AND title_contains (a case-insensitive substring) appears in the window title. An empty title_contains matches any title for that process.

approved_windows.name: Local text editor (Notepad scratch)
approved_windows.notes: Safe scratch target to verify a packet pasted correctly. Never submits.

approved_windows.name: VS Code scratch file
approved_windows.notes: Only a scratch file whose title contains ghoti_scratch is approved, not arbitrary editor tabs.
